response.original_title: Dining Room or There is Nothing
response.overview: Dining Room or There Is Nothing (2006) is a 60-second surrealist horror short by David B. Earle. It features a doll-like woman (Lea Porsager) in a dining room, reversing actions to say "There is nothing" while a fire burns in the background. Its eerie atmosphere, backward audio, and infinite loop explore themes of death and the afterlife.
response.title: Dining Room or There is Nothing
